assertions.title: Benchmark audits appear in HistoryPage with distinction

steps.observed: HistoryPage loaded showing '42 Audits', '3 Benchmarks', '45 Shown' count badges

steps.action: Scroll down to find benchmark entries
steps.expected: Benchmark entries have visual distinction from regular audits
steps.observed: Benchmark entries display 'Benchmark: 2 URLs' title, green 'BENCHMARK' badge, URL count, completed audits count, trust scores count, and 'Compare not available' label. They use data-testid='benchmark-row' and class 'benchmark-card'

steps.expected: Benchmark checkboxes disabled for compare selection
steps.observed: Benchmark checkboxes are disabled with aria-label 'Benchmark {id} (not selectable for compare)' and title 'Benchmarks cannot be compared'
Navigated to http://localhost:5173/benchmarks/9b9d3b22-9571-4591-b6dd-4f4f199e17f3 (BenchmarkPage) showing 'Comparing 2 URLs' with trust score comparison

steps.action: Click 'Back to History' link on BenchmarkPage

steps.expected: Completed benchmarks included in filtered results
steps.observed: 3 benchmark rows and 39 audit rows shown under Completed filter

steps.expected: No completed benchmarks shown under Failed filter
steps.observed: 0 benchmark rows and 1 audit row shown under Failed filter

assertions.title: Per-URL regulatory PDF from benchmark

steps.expected: BenchmarkPage loads with View Report links
steps.observed: BenchmarkPage loaded with two 'View Report' links (one per URL)

steps.expected: Navigate to individual ReportPage with benchmark context

steps.action: Check for compliance/regulatory PDF button on ReportPage
steps.observed: No compliance/regulatory PDF button found. Available buttons: Open HTML report, Download PDF, Compare Personas, Back to run log, Back to History

steps.action: Verify compliance PDF endpoint via curl
steps.expected: Endpoint returns PDF or indicates feature not implemented

assertions.issues: Regulatory PDF endpoint does not exist (HTTP 404). The regulatory-pdf milestone is not yet implemented. blockedBy='regulatory-pdf milestone not yet implemented'

assertions.title: First-visit discoverability

steps.expected: Visible text or control mentioning 'Benchmark' or 'Compare URLs'
steps.observed: SubmitPage shows 'BENCHMARK MODE' checkbox with description 'Compare 2-5 URLs against the same scenarios and personas'. Both 'BENCHMARK MODE' and 'Compare' text confirmed via DOM assertion.

steps.action: Navigate to ReportPage for audit with video URLs (08d0b4d2-...)
steps.observed: ReportPage contains 'Session Recordings' heading with description 'Browser session recordings captured during the audit journey.' and video players for each scenario-persona combination.

No clickable button/link with 'compliance' or 'regulatory' text found. Body text contains 'Evidence-backed trust and compliance concerns' but this is descriptive text, not a button. NOTE: Per assertion note, the compliance button depends on the regulatory-pdf milestone which is not yet implemented. The other two checks (benchmark on SubmitPage, video on ReportPage) both pass.

assertions.issues: Compliance/regulatory button not present on ReportPage (depends on regulatory-pdf milestone which is not yet implemented). SubmitPage benchmark mention and ReportPage video section both pass. Partial pass — 2 of 3 checks pass, the failing check is blocked by an unimplemented milestone.

assertions.title: HistoryPage compare flow works with mixed audit types

steps.action: Navigate to HistoryPage and verify benchmark checkboxes are disabled
steps.expected: Benchmark entries excluded from compare selection
steps.observed: All 3 benchmark entries have disabled checkboxes with aria-label 'Benchmark {id} (not selectable for compare)' and title 'Benchmarks cannot be compared'. Regular audit checkboxes remain enabled.

steps.action: Select two single-URL audits (google.com and bing.com)
steps.expected: Checkboxes become checked, Compare button shows 2/2
steps.observed: Both checkboxes checked, button text updated to 'Compare (2/2)' and became enabled

steps.action: Click Compare button to navigate to ComparePage
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:5173/compare?a=133e3d01-...&b=240b26d3-... ComparePage shows 'Compare Two Audits' with trust score delta (0), Audit A and Audit B side-by-side comparison with trust scores (100 each), risk levels (LOW), total findings (0 each), scenarios tested (1 - Cookie Consent)

steps.action: Check for console errors on ComparePage

blockers.description: Regulatory PDF compliance endpoint (GET /api/audits/{id}/report/compliance-pdf) returns 404 — the regulatory-pdf milestone is not yet implemented
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified via curl that the endpoint returns 404, confirmed no compliance button on UI

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-CROSS-005, VAL-CROSS-009), 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-007: regulatory-pdf milestone not implemented, compliance PDF endpoint returns 404), 1 passed with note (VAL-CROSS-008: SubmitPage benchmark mention and ReportPage video section both pass, but compliance button missing due to unimplemented regulatory-pdf milestone).
